S

S - Enum constant in enum class pl.AWTGameEngine.engine.enums.KeyCode
 
SaveAndGetPreferenceTest - Class in pl.AWTGameEngineTests.engine.Preferences

savePreference(String, String) - Method in class pl.AWTGameEngine.engine.Preferences
 
saveState(String, boolean) - Method in class pl.AWTGameEngine.scenes.Scene
If you want to save RigidBody objects (linear + angular velocity) then you should do it in PhysicsLoop to ensure that the call won't be invoked during the simulation run.
saveState(String, Scene, boolean) - Static method in class pl.AWTGameEngine.scenes.SceneStateSaver
 
SaveState - Annotation Interface in pl.AWTGameEngine.annotations.methods

SplashScreenWindow - Class in pl.AWTGameEngine.windows
SplashScreenWindow is used for create a splash screen, which will be shown as a loader screen while main window (with scene) is still loading.

synchronizedCall(Callable<T>) - Static method in class pl.AWTGameEngine.engine.helpers.FXHelper
Used to execute task on JavaFX thread, but synchronized - invoking thread will wait for the result of the task.
